direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: Two experimentally directed recipient drainages sharing an SGS proxy, each scored under two correlated locus filters. The source repository has no explicit license; raw bytes are runtime-only. No formal accuracy or gate truth is claimed.

outcome.guardrail: Two drainage manipulations share SGS and each contributes standard/strict views; four rows are not four independent validations or an accuracy denominator.

adjudication.guardrail: the manipulation fixes downstream flow, but SGS is a proxy, P1/P2 are serial samples, and filter scopes are correlated; no formal accuracy rate is defined
adjudication.severe_OOD_rule: max(direction RMS-z, gate RMS-z) > 10; heuristic diagnostic, not calibrated support

external_expectation.candidate_forward_direction: SGS source proxy P3 -> post-flow PCA P2
external_expectation.direction_basis: 2009 upstream translocation plus waterfall barriers imposed subsequent downstream flow
external_expectation.locus_ascertainment_guardrail: the author release was filtered across pre/post populations and both runner filters inspect post-flow P2; experimental direction is SNP-independent, but locus inclusion is not prospective held-out

published_same_data_sanity_checks.guardrail: support strong genomic change but reuse the same experiment/data

external_expectation.tree_contract_status: operational proxy order only; SGS proxies the introduced source and P1/P2 are pre/post serial samples of one recipient lineage

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

model_free_comparator.finite_sample_and_uncertainty_guardrail: projection/f3 are plug-in sample-frequency geometry; the chromosome-block bootstrap resamples linkage blocks, not fish, and supplies no temporal direction
model_free_comparator.interpretation: reference-invariant descriptive geometry; projection is not bounded ancestry, and neither projection nor f3 estimates temporal direction

scaffold_block_bootstrap.guardrail: descriptive linked-locus sensitivity only; case ascertainment and label reuse remain
scaffold_block_bootstrap.method: nonparametric scaffold-block bootstrap with equal scaffold resampling

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

runtime.process_priority: BelowNormal requested at runner start on Windows

combined_VCF_audit.INFO_policy: reset to dot; source AF/NS are from a combined dataset and not population-specific

source.data_use_policy: runtime fetch only; do not vendor source bytes or author code

format_script_audit.benchmark_mapping: NCA pre-flow P1; PCA post-flow P2
format_script_audit.discrepancy: the population-code comment labels NCA as post-flow even though PCA is also labelled post-flow and all downstream analysis/paper semantics use NCA as pre-flow

source.locus_ascertainment_guardrail: the author release was filtered across pre/post populations and both runner filters inspect post-flow P2; direction is experimentally SNP-independent, but this is not prospective held-out validation
source.paper_release_discrepancy: paper reports 12,407 SNPs, while each of the five runtime-verified VCFs contains 11,417
source.repository_tree_verification: metadata pin from the source audit; runtime verifies each fetched payload by byte count, SHA-256, and computed Git blob SHA-1 but does not reconstruct the tree

analysis_design.caigual: P1=NCA pre-flow recipient (18), P2=PCA post-flow recipient (19), P3=SGS source proxy (9)
guardrails: Caigual and Taylor are two ecological recipient units sharing one SGS source proxy.
P1/P2 are serial samples of recipient lineages and SGS is not the exact introduced cohort.
Standard/strict filters are correlated; strict panels have only 30 and 22 loci.
Release and benchmark locus selection use post-flow samples; this is a transfer stress test, not prospective held-out validation.
Published FST and monomorphism changes reuse the experiment/genotypes and are sanity checks, not extra labels.
analysis_design.locus_ascertainment_guardrail: The author release was filtered across pre/post populations, and both runner filters inspect post-flow P2. Experimental direction is SNP-independent, but locus inclusion is not prospective held-out.
analysis_design.taylor: P1=NTY pre-flow recipient (17), P2=PTY post-flow recipient (23), P3=SGS source proxy (9)

record.data_use_policy: Fetch exact bytes at runtime only; do not vendor source VCFs or author code without a license grant.

paper.title: Genomic and Fitness Consequences of Genetic Rescue in Wild Populations

release_discrepancies: The paper reports 12,407 SNPs, but each of the five runtime-verified VCFs contains 11,417.
format_guppy_data.R incorrectly comments that NCA is post-flow; downstream code, paper, and ancestry plots use NCA as pre-flow and PCA as post-flow.
The author data repository has no explicit LICENSE/COPYING file and GitHub reports license=null.
